locations_new.name: EXT. CHECHEN AOUL SIDE STREET - DAY
locations_new.literary_description: he turned to the left into a narrow side street, and on reaching the second saklya, which was cut into the hill side, he stopped and looked round
locations_new.cinematic_description: Tight, shadowed alley between stone saklyas carved into a hillside. Low angle on Hadji Murad's horse moving cautiously. His eyes scan doorways and rooftops. The street is deserted — a deliberate choice by a man who knows what surveillance looks like.
locations_new.atmosphere: Paranoia and concealment. A fugitive threading the needle between visibility and safety. The narrowness of the street mirrors his narrowing options.
production_notes: Stone and clay construction, buildings carved directly into hillside — emphasizes organic, fortress-like quality
Penthouse (covered porch/overhang) in front of the saklya is key architectural element
Freshly plastered clay chimney — detail of domestic life amid danger
Sheepskin as universal prop: bedding, cloak, marker of poverty and simplicity

locations_new.name: EXT. OLD MAN'S SAKLYA ROOF - DAY
locations_new.literary_description: on the roof of the saklya itself, behind the freshly plastered clay chimney, lay a man covered with a sheepskin
locations_new.cinematic_description: Flat roof, midday heat. An old man asleep behind a chimney — a sentinel who has stopped watching. Hadji Murad taps him awake with a whip handle. The contrast between the dormant old man and Hadji Murad's coiled alertness captures the scene's tension.
locations_new.atmosphere: Fragile safety. The trust network Hadji Murad relies on is aging and slow. A quiet dread beneath the mundane.
production_notes: Wooden-heeled slippers by the chimney — costume/prop detail signaling unhurried village life
Old man's greasy beshmet and nightcap: poverty, comfort, age
Ladder leaning against roof: vertical movement possible, escape route implied
Sunburnt, shrivelled neck — physical decay contrasting with Hadji Murad's vitality

locations_new.name: INT. OLD MAN'S SAKLYA - DAY
locations_new.literary_description: a slight, spare, middle-aged woman in a yellow smock, red beshmet, and wide blue trousers came through an inner door carrying cushions
locations_new.cinematic_description: Dark interior, low ceiling. Warm colour burst as the woman enters — yellow, red, blue against stone grey. She brings cushions: a gesture of hospitality that is also a ritual, almost liturgical. The space contracts around Hadji Murad as he crosses the threshold, limping.
locations_new.atmosphere: Brief sanctuary. Domesticity as refuge. The hospitality ritual creates a fragile bubble of safety — the audience knows it cannot last.
production_notes: Thin, creaking door — sound design opportunity: the creak announces every entry
Outer door and inner door structure — staging depth, character blocking
Woman's costume: yellow smock, red beshmet, wide blue trousers — vivid colour palette, cinematically striking against grey stone interiors
Cushions as prop: comfort offered in a dangerous moment
Hadji Murad's slight limp — established here, recurring physical motif

locations_updated.name: Chechen aoul side street / safe saklya
locations_updated.update: Confirmed as same location cluster. Now subdivided into: EXT. CHECHEN AOUL SIDE STREET, EXT. OLD MAN'S SAKLYA ROOF, INT. OLD MAN'S SAKLYA. The 'second saklya cut into the hillside' is the specific target — not Sado's saklya, but an unnamed old man's dwelling used as a first safe house.

timeline_events.event: Hadji Murad and his single murid ride into the aoul, avoiding the main square by taking a narrow side street
timeline_events.time: Daytime — exact date unspecified, post-defection, Act 1
timeline_events.location: EXT. CHECHEN AOUL SIDE STREET - DAY

timeline_events.event: Hadji Murad stops at the second saklya cut into the hillside; finds an old man asleep on the roof under a sheepskin; wakes him with his whip handle
timeline_events.location: EXT. OLD MAN'S SAKLYA ROOF - DAY

timeline_events.event: Old man recognizes Hadji Murad, exchanges Selaam greeting; descends ladder; orders his grandson (boy of fifteen) to fetch the boy's father from the mosque
timeline_events.location: EXT. OLD MAN'S SAKLYA ROOF / PENTHOUSE - DAY

timeline_events.event: Hadji Murad enters the saklya; middle-aged woman comes through inner door with cushions to receive him
